news.t: REX Shares Launches Two New T-REX 2X Single-Stock ETFs on CRWV and SMR

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long SMR Daily Target ETF (SMUP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of NuScale Power Corporation stock (NYSE: SMR), less fees and expenses. SMUP was launched on Jul 25, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches Two New T-REX 2X Single-Stock ETFs on CRWV and SMR
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX Shares is pleased to announce the launch of two new leveraged ETFs: the T-REX 2X Long SMR Daily Target ETF (CBOE: SMUP) and the T-REX 2X Long CRWV Daily Target ETF (CBOE...
